milestone: v2_6_133 — Engine Ballad Classic Brush Fill Overlays
scope: Add phrase-level classic Jazz Ballad brush fill overlays on top of the real brush sound-source time-feel contract: soft pickup-to-4, tap-drag-tap release, single-stroke-4 to next phrase, turnaround sweep roll, and final release. All offbeats keep shared swing-8 timing; no custom brush voices, no chord-region fill loop, and no piano/bass/voicing/API/Agent/HarmonyOS change.
